---
title: "III. Jesus in Creation"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    geometry: margin=1in
    fontsize: 11pt
    pdf-engine: xelatex
mainfont: "Arial"
---

# III. Jesus in Creation


## A. Jesus in Creation from Scripture
1. New Testament Passages

 a. [John 1:1-3](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=John+1%3A1&version=WEB) — The Word (Jesus) was with God in the beginning; all things were created through Him

 b. [Colossians 1:15-17](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Col+1%3A15&version=WEB) — Jesus is the image of the invisible God; all things created through Him and for Him; in Him all things hold together

 c. [Hebrews 1:1-3](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Heb+1%3A2&version=WEB) — God created the world through His Son, who upholds the universe by the word of His power

 d. [1 Corinthians 8:6](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=1Cor+8%3A6&version=WEB) — One Lord Jesus Christ, through whom are all things

 e. [Ephesians 3:9](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Eph+3%3A9&version=WEB) — God created all things (some manuscripts: "through Jesus Christ")

2. Old Testament Passages

 a. [Genesis 1:26](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Gen+1%3A26&version=WEB) — "Let us make man in our image" — plural language hinting at plurality within God

 b. [Proverbs 8:22-31](https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Prov+8%3A22&version=WEB) — Wisdom personified as present and active at creation (often interpreted as pointing to the pre-incarnate Christ)

 c. [Creation Video — Bible Project](https://bibleproject.com/videos/genesis-1/)


## B. Scriptures On Six day event and man made on day six
1. Six-Day Creation

 a. How long is a day?

  i. Twenty-four hours

  ii. Daytime (daylight hours)

  iii. An era or period of time

 b. Scripture on days

  i. "Morning and evening" — a day

  [ii. Six-Day Creation Scripture References](jesus-in-creation_files/six day creation.html)

3. Man Created in the Beginning (Day 6)

 a. Popular view: man appeared billions of years after creation via evolution

 b. Scripture on man existing from the beginning

 c. New Testament Scriptures

  [i. New Testament Scriptures](jesus-in-creation_files/people in the beginning.html)


## C. How These Truths Help Make Sense of Origins
1. Creation of the Universe

 a. Time, matter, and space were all created together

  i. Einstein showed they are coupled and interdependent

  ii. E = MC² — mass and energy are interlinked

  iii. Therefore time, space, and mass/energy came into existence at the same moment

  iv. [Video: Time, Space, and Matter](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=w6AHcv19NIc)

 b. Whatever created the material world could not itself be material

  i. [Creator joke (clean version)](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/saeW0lqCufM)

 c. Second Law of Thermodynamics

  i. Things do not naturally go from disorder to order

  ii. Incredible complexity and order in the cosmos requires an explanation

  iii. Fine-tuning of physical constants points to intentional design

2. Creation of Life

 a. Life did not spring into existence from non-life

  i. A "simple" cell is not simple

  ii. Information always comes from a mind — DNA and RNA are coded with information
